title: Graphify + Obsidian + Claude Code = CHEAT CODE
summary: Chase AI demonstrates a workflow combining Graphify, Obsidian, and Claude Code to improve knowledge management and LLM-assisted coding. The approach uses Graphify to extract repository structure, Obsidian as a knowledge vault, and feeds insights to Claude Code for better context-aware code generation.
writeup: Chase AI demonstrates a workflow that connects three tools: Graphify for repository analysis, Obsidian for knowledge management, and Claude Code for code generation. The integration builds knowledge graph insights from a repository and merges them into an Obsidian vault, which then feeds Claude Code to improve the quality of its output. The takeaway is a concrete pipeline where graph-based repository analysis serves as structured context for code generation.
